author: model:claude-opus-4-8
text: Replaced equal-exposure pair sizing with equal-profit sizing (commit f7a09fc, 2026-04-18) after a live activity-log line showed a scalp locking only GBP 0.08; the old formula equalised exposure, not P&L, at non-zero commission.

author: model:claude-opus-4-8
text: Zeroed CLOSE_SIGNAL_BONUS (commit f193e41 halved 1.0->0.5; 5d57a91 zeroed to 0.0): the shaped per-close bonus structurally competed against natural maturation, which has no equivalent shaped reward, so it was deleted rather than re-tuned.

author: model:claude-opus-4-8
text: Made the raw naked penalty per-pair: replaced min(0, sum(naked_pnls)) with sum(min(0, per_pair_naked_pnl)) so a lucky naked win can no longer cancel an unrelated naked loss in the same race (2026-04-17/18).

author: model:claude-opus-4-7
text: scalping_locked_pnl is redefined per-pair as max(0, min(win_pnl, lose_pnl)) so that equal-stake pairs (which lock nothing) contribute zero, removing the perverse gradient where outcome-luck on a directional pair laundered into the locked bucket.

author: model:claude-opus-4-7
text: GA plumbing audit becomes a precondition for any cohort campaign: every sampled gene must have an end-to-end test that proves the value reaches the consumer object; sampling without reading is treated as the same bug class as the Path-A get(default) foot gun.

author: model:claude-opus-4-7
text: Promote C11 ([256,128] unweighted-BCE) to the next cohort's --direction-head-manifest; drop --enable-gene direction_prob_loss_weight and --enable-gene bc_direction_target_weight per shared-direction-head hard constraints.
